pageTitle: Terms and Conditions of Use | Sebastián Tamayo
pageDescription: Terms and conditions of use for Sebastián Tamayo's website. Acceptance, intellectual property, limitations, and applicable law.
content:
# Terms and Conditions of Use

**Website:** tasy.work  
**Responsible Party:** Sebastián Tamayo  
**Email:** home@tasy.work  
**City:** Medellín, Colombia  
**Last updated:** June 2025

---

## 1. Acceptance

Access and use of the website **tasy.work** implies full and unreserved acceptance of these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any of them, you must refrain from using the site.

## 2. Purpose of the site

tasy.work is the website of Sebastián Tamayo, freelance web developer under the **Tasy Web** brand. The purpose of the site is to present web development services, digital consulting, and lead generation through contact forms.

## 3. Acceptable use

The user agrees to use the site lawfully and in good faith. The following is prohibited:

- Reproducing, distributing, or modifying site content without written authorization.
- Using the site for illegal, fraudulent purposes, or in violation of third-party rights.
- Attempting to access site systems, servers, or databases without authorization.
- Submitting false information through contact forms.
- Performing scraping, automated crawling, or any mass extraction of content.

## 4. Intellectual property

All content on the site —texts, images, code, design, logos, and brand— is the property of Sebastián Tamayo or licensed in his favor. Its reproduction or use without express authorization is prohibited.

## 5. Forms and personal data

Use of the contact forms implies the processing of personal data as set forth in the **Privacy Policy** available at tasy.work/en/privacy, which is an integral part of these terms.

By submitting a form, the user declares that the information provided is truthful and authorizes its processing for the purposes indicated in that policy.

## 6. Limitation of liability

Sebastián Tamayo shall not be liable for:

- Interruptions or errors in site availability due to technical causes beyond his control.
- Damages arising from the use or inability to use the site.
- The content of third-party websites linked from tasy.work. Such links are provided for informational purposes only and do not imply endorsement or responsibility for their content.

## 7. Modifications

These Terms and Conditions may be updated at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication on the site. It is recommended to review this page periodically. The current version will always be available at **tasy.work/en/terms**.

## 8. Applicable law and jurisdiction

These Terms are governed by the laws of the **Republic of Colombia**. Any dispute arising from the use of the site shall be submitted to the jurisdiction of the courts of the city of **Medellín, Antioquia**.

## 9. Contact

For any questions regarding these terms:

**Email:** home@tasy.work  
**Website:** tasy.work
